title: 3M turns to AI to fuel turnaround
summary: Yahoo Finance Ines Ferre joins Josh Lipton on Market Domination to discuss the 3M Company (MMM) turnaround after the company beat earnings expectations and raised its full-year outlook. Ferre also explores how 3M is using artificial intelligence to optimize its operations and support its business transformation.

title: Nvidia Vera Rubin shown to provide 10x more throughput per megawatt than Blackwell
summary: Investing.com -- Nvidia announced Tuesday that its Vera Rubin platform is entering production with more than 300 global partners across 350 factory sites in 30 countries. Partners including CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure, Oracle Cloud Infrastructure and Mistral are deploying the new rack-scale AI system.

title: Jim Cramer Says Stop Betting on Volatile Tech Stocks and Buy These “Boring” Sectors Instead
summary: Jim Cramer compared owning tech stocks to being tied to railroad tracks while a freight train approaches, and he has a very specific set of sectors in mind as the escape route.

title: Stock Market Today, July 21: Micron Surges 12% as Semiconductor Strength Lifts Nasdaq
summary: Today, July 21, 2026, memory-chip leaders rallied, leading stocks higher even as investors weighed geopolitical and tariff risks.

title: Beyond The Sticker Price: What You Are Really Paying For Microsoft Stock
summary: The software giant looks expensive on the surface, but a patient investor is effectively buying its future growth at a significant discount.

title: Nasdaq Rallies Ahead of Magnificent 7 Earnings: Stock Market Today
summary: Earnings are the most important thing, and expectations are high. But interest rates are rising, and energy tensions aren't easing.

title: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Following Microsoft AI Deal Faces A Fully Valued Debate
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock is back in focus after the company announced an expanded collaboration with Microsoft, placing AMD’s Helios rack scale AI systems at the center of Azure’s frontier model inference plans. title: Why AMZN Costs More Than Its Peer Group
summary: The market is charging a premium for Amazon's stock, but its growth and profit metrics lag far behind its tech peers. Is this a bet on the future, or just an old habit.

title: MAGS Delivered 181% Since Launch, But Equal-Weighted Tech Concentration Is Now a Liability
summary: The Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF has crushed the broad market since its launch, but equal-weighting seven mega-cap giants cuts both ways, and 2026 is exposing exactly how badly that math can unravel when the group stops moving together.
